title: Joe Hartsoe
compiled_truth: Joe Hartsoe is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-31), Joe Hartsoe sent 35 and received 2311 emails, totalling 2346 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (17), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (13), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (12), [Mary Hain](people/mary-hain) (10), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (9). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_objectives, deleted_items, inbox, projects.
